# ToolHive — Free AI Tools Platform
**URL:** https://toolhive.app
**Description:** ToolHive offers 200+ free AI-powered tools for PDF, image, video, writing, calculators, and more. No signup required. Works in your browser instantly.

## About
ToolHive is a free online AI tools platform. We believe powerful tools should be accessible to everyone without paywalls or account requirements. All tools run in your browser — no data uploaded to servers, no watermarks, no limits.

## Key Features
- 200+ free AI tools
- No signup required
- No watermarks
- No file size limits
- Works entirely in your browser
- Batch file processing
- 100% free forever

---

## PDF Tools
### Compress PDF
**URL:** https://toolhive.app/tools/pdf/compress
**Keywords:** compress PDF online free no signup, compress PDF online free no limit, free PDF compressor, no watermark, batch compress
**Description:** Compress PDF online free — no signup, no limit, no watermark. Reduce PDF file size by up to 90% with AI-powered compression. Batch compress unlimited PDF files instantly.

### AI PDF Summarizer
**URL:** https://toolhive.app/tools/pdf/summarize-pdf
**Keywords:** AI PDF summarizer free no signup, free AI PDF summarizer, pdf summarizer, document summarizer, no limit
**Description:** Summarize any PDF document with AI — completely free, no signup required, no limits. Upload your PDF and get instant AI-powered summaries with key points.

### Merge PDF
**URL:** https://toolhive.app/tools/pdf/merge
**Keywords:** merge PDF, combine PDF, join PDF files
**Description:** Combine multiple PDF files into one. Drag to reorder pages before merging.

### Split PDF
**URL:** https://toolhive.app/tools/pdf/split
**Keywords:** split PDF, separate PDF pages, extract PDF pages
**Description:** Split a PDF into individual pages or custom page ranges.

### PDF to Word
**URL:** https://toolhive.app/tools/pdf/pdf-to-word
**Keywords:** PDF to Word, convert PDF to DOCX, editable PDF
**Description:** Convert PDF documents to editable Word (.docx) files with AI-powered layout preservation.

### PDF OCR
**URL:** https://toolhive.app/tools/pdf/ocr
**Keywords:** PDF OCR, extract text from scanned PDF, searchable PDF
**Description:** Extract text from scanned PDFs and images using AI-powered OCR. Supports 40+ languages.

### Sign PDF
**URL:** https://toolhive.app/tools/pdf/sign
**Keywords:** sign PDF, digital signature, esign
**Description:** Add digital signatures to PDF files. Draw, type, or upload your signature.

---

## Image Tools
### Remove Background
**URL:** https://toolhive.app/tools/image/remove-background
**Keywords:** remove background from image free no watermark, background remover free no signup, transparent background, AI background remover
**Description:** Remove background from image free online — no signup, no watermark, instant results. Get transparent PNG backgrounds in seconds using AI.

### Resize Image
**URL:** https://toolhive.app/tools/image/resize
**Keywords:** free image resize, resize image free, image resizer online, resize photo free
**Description:** Free image resize — no signup, no watermark, no quality loss. Resize images to exact pixel dimensions. Works for passport photos, social media, print, and web.

### Compress Image
**URL:** https://toolhive.app/tools/image/img-compress
**Keywords:** compress image, reduce image size, optimize image
**Description:** Compress JPEG, PNG, WebP images up to 90% smaller with no visible quality loss.

### AI Image Upscaler
**URL:** https://toolhive.app/tools/image/upscale
**Keywords:** upscale image, AI image enhancement, increase resolution
**Description:** Upscale images 2x or 4x using high-quality resampling with sharpening.

### QR Code Generator
**URL:** https://toolhive.app/tools/image/qr-code
**Keywords:** QR code generator, generate QR code, QR code
**Description:** Generate QR codes for URLs, text, Wi-Fi, vCard, and more.

### Convert Image
**URL:** https://toolhive.app/tools/image/convert
**Keywords:** convert image format, JPG to PNG, PNG to JPG, WebP
**Description:** Convert between JPG, PNG, WebP, AVIF, GIF and more. Batch convert hundreds of images.

---

## AI Writing Tools
### AI Summarizer
**URL:** https://toolhive.app/tools/ai-writing/summarize
**Keywords:** AI summarizer, text summarizer, summarize text, condense text
**Description:** Summarize long articles, documents, or text into clear bullet points or concise paragraphs with one click. Free AI summarizer — no signup, no limit.

### Grammar Checker
**URL:** https://toolhive.app/tools/ai-writing/grammar-check
**Keywords:** grammar checker free no signup, free grammar checker, AI grammar checker, spell check
**Description:** Free grammar checker — no signup, no limit. Instantly fix grammar, spelling, and punctuation errors with AI-powered corrections.

### AI Paraphraser
**URL:** https://toolhive.app/tools/ai-writing/paraphrase
**Keywords:** paraphrasing tool free no signup, free paraphrasing tool, reword text, avoid plagiarism
**Description:** Free paraphrasing tool — no signup, no limit. Reword any text while keeping the original meaning. Choose from multiple paraphrase modes.

### AI Translator
**URL:** https://toolhive.app/tools/ai-writing/translate
**Keywords:** AI translator, translate text, language translator, 100+ languages
**Description:** Translate text between 100+ languages with context-aware AI translation.

### AI Rewriter
**URL:** https://toolhive.app/tools/ai-writing/rewrite
**Keywords:** AI rewriter, rewrite text, improve writing
**Description:** Rewrite any text to improve clarity, tone, or style. Choose from professional, casual, formal, or creative modes.

### Twitter Thread Writer
**URL:** https://toolhive.app/tools/ai-writing/twitter-thread
**Keywords:** Twitter thread generator AI free, free twitter thread generator, ai thread generator, viral twitter thread
**Description:** Free AI Twitter thread generator — no signup needed. Write viral Twitter/X threads instantly with hooks, numbered points, and engaging CTAs.

### LinkedIn Post Writer
**URL:** https://toolhive.app/tools/ai-writing/linkedin-post
**Keywords:** LinkedIn post generator AI free, free linkedin post generator, viral linkedin post
**Description:** Free AI LinkedIn post generator — no signup required. Write engaging, viral LinkedIn posts about career wins, lessons, and insights.

### YouTube Script Writer
**URL:** https://toolhive.app/tools/ai-writing/youtube-script
**Keywords:** YouTube script generator AI free, free youtube script generator, video script writer
**Description:** Free AI YouTube script generator — no signup needed. Write complete YouTube video scripts with hooks, intros, main content, transitions, and CTAs.

### AI Caption Generator
**URL:** https://toolhive.app/tools/ai-writing/caption-generator
**Keywords:** caption generator, social media caption, instagram caption
**Description:** Generate engaging captions for Instagram, Twitter, LinkedIn, and TikTok with hashtag suggestions.

## Resume Tools
### Resume Builder
**URL:** https://toolhive.app/tools/resume/builder
**Keywords:** free premium resume builder, premium resume builder no signup, resume builder free, create resume, professional resume
**Description:** Free premium resume builder — no signup, no watermark, no limit. Create professional resumes with AI-powered suggestions, 50+ premium templates, and smart formatting.

### Resume Analyzer
**URL:** https://toolhive.app/tools/resume/analyzer
**Keywords:** resume analyzer, AI resume feedback, resume improvement
**Description:** Upload your resume and get detailed AI-powered feedback. Fix common mistakes, improve formatting.

### LinkedIn Profile Writer
**URL:** https://toolhive.app/tools/resume/linkedin-writer
**Keywords:** LinkedIn profile writer, optimize linkedin profile, linkedin headline
**Description:** Optimize your LinkedIn profile with AI. Generate compelling headline, About section, and experience bullets.

### Cover Letter Generator
**URL:** https://toolhive.app/tools/resume/cover-letter
**Keywords:** cover letter generator, AI cover letter, job application
**Description:** Generate personalized cover letters in seconds. Input your details and job description for a tailored letter.

### Resume ATS Checker
**URL:** https://toolhive.app/tools/resume/ats-checker
**Keywords:** ATS checker, resume ATS, applicant tracking system
**Description:** Check how well your resume passes Applicant Tracking Systems. Get ATS compatibility score with actionable fixes.

## More Tool Categories
- **Generators:** QR codes, passwords, UUIDs, usernames, D&D characters
- **Text & Writing:** Word counter, grammar checker, case converter, lorem ipsum
- **SEO & Web:** Meta tag generator, structured data validator, sitemap generator
- **Health & Fitness:** BMI, calorie calculator, workout generator
- **Finance & Business:** Invoice generator, ROI calculator, profit margin
- **Education & Learning:** Flashcards, quiz maker, vocabulary builder
- **Travel & Location:** Trip distance, timezone converter, packing list
- **Entertainment & Fun:** Meme generator, movie plot generator, D&D character generator

---

## Technical Information
**Stack:** Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4
**Hosting:** Deployed on Vercel
**HTTPS:** Enabled
**Sitemap:** https://toolhive.app/sitemap.xml
**Contact:** https://toolhive.app/contact
**Privacy Policy:** https://toolhive.app/privacy
**Terms of Service:** https://toolhive.app/terms
